surfaces.description: Checked-in plugin install surface and root marketplace artifacts derived from repo-owned source paths.
notes: Edit the repo-owned source path, not the checked-in plugin export.
If a derived artifact changes, regenerate it and commit the result.

surfaces.description: Committed RCA conversion ledger events and the validator/aggregator that keep the JSONL metric well-formed.
notes: Commit live non-seed closeout events with the work that produced them; do not rewrite historical duplicates.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned markdown docs and generated markdown copies that need link, lint, and secret checks.
notes: Keep human-facing docs in sync with generated markdown copies.
Run the markdown and link checks before closeout.

surfaces.description: Machine-readable evidence captured beside achieve goal artifacts.
verify_commands: for evidence_file in charness-artifacts/goals/*.json; do python3 -m json.tool "$evidence_file" >/dev/null || exit $?; done
notes: Commit goal-scoped raw evidence with the goal log that explains the command, version, and interpretation.

surfaces.description: Prompt-affecting instruction surfaces must follow deterministic Cautilus validation and on-demand proof policy.
notes: Prompt-affecting changes must follow `.agents/cautilus-adapter.yaml`; prompt diffs alone do not require a live Cautilus run or refreshed proof artifact.
Legacy route-only fixtures stay as deterministic schema/runner sentinels, not routine live closeout proof.
Log-backed behavior or improvement claims must record the Cautilus run and, for improvement claims, a baseline compare path in the cautilus artifact.

surfaces.description: Public and support skill packages plus their helper scripts.
notes: Skill trigger contracts stay source-owned under skills/, not under plugins/.
Cross-namespace mentions (charness-artifacts/<other>/, .agents/<other>-adapter.yaml) require an allowlist entry in scripts/check_skill_ownership_overlap.allowlist.txt with a written reason.

surfaces.description: Public skill classification policy and validator that must stay aligned with the current public skill set.
notes: New, renamed, or reclassified public skills must be reflected in `docs/public-skill-validation.json` before closeout.

surfaces.description: Checked-in consumer dogfood cases for public skills and the validator that keeps them aligned with current skill contracts.
notes: When a reviewed consumer dogfood case drifts from current skill contracts, refresh the scaffold first and only then update the checked-in review observations.

surfaces.description: Profile and preset bundles that define packaged defaults.
notes: Do not leave packaged defaults pointing at missing artifacts.

surfaces.description: Repo-local adapter contracts and adapter helper libraries.
notes: Adapter contracts should stay machine-readable and loadable.

surfaces.description: Advisory CLI ergonomics registry and archetype inputs for the charness command surface.
notes: This inventory is advisory; promote only low-noise behavior-shaped findings to failing gates.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned mutating CLI probe contract for no-side-effect help, option-looking positional rejection, dry-run or waiver, and watched side-effect seams.
notes: Use --execute-probes only with entries that declare safe_to_execute inside a sandboxed fixture.

surfaces.description: Checked-in quality inventory artifacts refreshed by local quality phases.
notes: The local quality gate refreshes this tracked SLOC inventory; commit semantic count changes with the code or docs that caused them.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned changed-surface manifest that drives slice closeout obligations.
notes: Keep the surfaces manifest aligned with real repo-owned source and derived obligations.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned JavaScript tooling manifest and npm lockfile used by markdown, secret, and public-web reader tooling.
notes: Keep package manifests and lockfiles aligned when adding repo-local tool binaries.
Online audit findings are advisory unless a dedicated dependency-refresh slice changes the enforced threshold.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned JavaScript agent-runtime modules and their native test command.
notes: StrykerJS should exercise this JS-native surface directly; Python pytest tests remain cross-language integration smokes.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned scheduled mutation testing workflow, runner config, and adapter slot behavior.
notes: Keep workflow behavior, adapter commands, runner config, and exported helpers aligned.
PR dry-run mode must not require a full-run mutation dump.

surfaces.description: Checked-in critique records and prepare packets for task-completing repo work.
notes: Task-completing repo work keeps the critique packet and satisfaction signal durable.

surfaces.description: Checked-in host/runtime probe JSON artifacts used as closeout evidence.
verify_commands: for path in charness-artifacts/probe/*.json; do python3 -m json.tool "$path" >/dev/null || exit $?; done
notes: Probe artifacts stay machine-readable and bind to the goal, issue, or release that cites them.

surfaces.description: Checked-in long-context chatbot proposal packets and their current-pointer artifacts.
notes: Keep the checked-in proposal packet and the visible current-pointer artifact in sync.
This surface is proposal-mining evidence, not yet a compare-backed benchmark claim.
While `.agents/cautilus-adapter.yaml` uses `run_mode: disabled`, do not run proposal eval commands.

surfaces.description: A/B comparison runner and current-pointer artifacts for long-context chatbot proposal benchmarking.
notes: Keep compare artifacts explicit about baseline versus candidate and about proposal keys omitted by the product's current ranking cap.
While `.agents/cautilus-adapter.yaml` uses `run_mode: disabled`, do not run benchmark eval commands.

surfaces.description: Generated source-linked index over debug artifact seam-risk fields.
notes: The index must link back to source debug artifacts and must not replace incident records with a single risk score.

surfaces.description: Generated advisory index for source-linked retro lesson digest selection.
notes: The index is advisory source-linked selection evidence; it must not replace dated retro artifacts or make `recent-lessons.md` opaque.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned specdown executable acceptance specs and their config.
notes: Keep executable specs focused on stable operator-facing behavior; avoid adding adapters until setup or JSON extraction repeats.

surfaces.description: Integration manifests and control-plane helper scripts.
notes: Prefer dry-run capable control-plane checks before claiming the integration surface is healthy.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned maintainer hook and hook bootstrap validation.
notes: Maintainer-local hook enforcement should fail closed when the clone drifts.

surfaces.description: Repo-owned Python code and tests.
verify_commands: ruff check charness scripts tests skills/public/*/scripts skills/support/*/scripts
notes: Use targeted tests when iterating, but close out on the strongest standing Python gates the slice touched.
Release-only install/update lifecycle tests are excluded from the standing Python closeout gate and should run for release, packaging, or tool lifecycle changes.
